_instructions.pdf_support: Place a PDF as 'slides.pdf' in the slides folder

title: AI Tools Exploration
subtitle: discover the power of smart technology!
overview: This session introduces students to popular AI tools used for creativity, learning, coding, design, communication, and productivity. Students explore how AI tools can help people solve problems, generate ideas, automate tasks, and create innovative projects responsibly.

images._note: Add photos of students exploring AI tools, AI-generated art, coding tools, chatbot demos, and collaborative activities.

gallery.caption: AI chatbots can answer questions and assist users
AI tools can generate creative artwork and designs

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Students using AI tools for learning
gallery.caption: AI tools support education and personalized learning
AI coding tools help developers write and debug programs

gallery._placeholder: ADD: Voice AI or speech assistant image
gallery.caption: Voice AI can recognize and respond to speech
AI tools may become part of everyday work and learning

keyTopics: Benefits and Challenges of AI Tools
Responsible and Ethical Use of AI

youtubeVideos.title: Introduction to AI Tools
youtubeVideos._note: Replace videoId with actual YouTube video ID
youtubeVideos.desc: Overview of popular AI tools and how they are used.

youtubeVideos.title: How AI Chatbots Work
youtubeVideos.desc: Learn how conversational AI systems interact with users.

youtubeVideos.title: AI Art and Creativity
youtubeVideos.desc: Explore how AI can generate images, music, and creative content.

youtubeVideos.title: Future of AI Tools
youtubeVideos.desc: How AI tools may transform learning, work, and innovation.

activity.title: Explore and Present an AI Tool
steps: Choose an AI tool to explore
Create a short presentation or demo

options: Software that uses artificial intelligence to help users
quiz.explanation: AI tools use artificial intelligence to automate tasks, generate content, or assist users.

quiz.q: Which of these is an example of an AI tool?
quiz.explanation: Many modern AI tools help with communication, creativity, and productivity.

quiz.q: How can AI tools help students?
quiz.explanation: AI tools can improve learning, productivity, and creative work.
AI chatbots interact with users through text or speech.

quiz.q: What can AI art tools create?
quiz.explanation: AI creativity tools can generate many forms of digital content.

quiz.q: Why is responsible AI use important?
quiz.explanation: Responsible AI helps protect privacy, fairness, and ethical standards.

quiz.q: Which AI tool can help programmers write code?
quiz.explanation: AI coding tools assist developers with writing and debugging programs.
Voice AI understands spoken language and responds to commands.

quiz.q: What is one challenge of AI tools?
quiz.explanation: AI tools must be used responsibly to protect privacy and avoid misuse.

quiz.q: What skill is important when using AI tools?
quiz.explanation: Using AI effectively requires creativity, analysis, and responsible behavior.
